I will put my final answer inside \boxed{}.

factor values: 1.889, 1.889, 1.889, 1.889
factor values (sorted): 1.889, 1.889, 1.889, 1.889
The median factor is 1.889.

Converting 12.48:
12.48 * 1.889:
12.48 * 0.009 = 0.11232
12.48 * 0.080 = 0.99840
12.48 * 0.800 = 9.98400
12.48 * 1.000 = 12.48000
0.11232 + 0.99840 = 1.11072
1.11072 + 9.98400 = 11.09472
11.09472 + 12.48000 = 23.57472
= 23.574

I will now return the answer in \boxed{}
The answer in \boxed{–} is \boxed{23.574}
